data.summary:
Read https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/openai-and-nvidia-announce-strategic-partnership-to-deploy-10gw-of-nvidia-systems:
OpenAI and NVIDIA announced a strategic partnership on deploying at least 10 gigawatts of NVIDIA systems for AI data centers. NVIDIA intends to invest up to $100 billion in OpenAI progressively as each gigawatt is deployed. The first gigawatt of NVIDIA systems will be deployed in the second half of 2026 on the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform.
Key facts:
  - Investment size: up to $100 billion from NVIDIA to OpenAI
  - Total deployment: at least 10 gigawatts of NVIDIA systems
  - First gigawatt deployment timeline: second half of 2026
  - First gigawatt platform: NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform
  - Partnership announced as letter of intent for strategic collaboration between OpenAI and NVIDIA

The first gigawatt of NVIDIA systems will be deployed in the second half of 2026 on the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform.
key_facts: Investment size: up to $100 billion from NVIDIA to OpenAI
Total deployment: at least 10 gigawatts of NVIDIA systems
First gigawatt deployment timeline: second half of 2026
First gigawatt platform: NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform
Partnership announced as letter of intent for strategic collaboration between OpenAI and NVIDIA

data.evaluation: The Nvidia press release confirmed the date (September 22, 2025) alongside the other key facts. I have sufficient grounding to answer.

data.answer:
Here are all four key details from Nvidia and OpenAI's announced strategic partnership:

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Investment Size** | Up to **$100 billion** from NVIDIA in OpenAI |
| **Gigawatts to be Deployed** | At least **10 gigawatts (GW)** of NVIDIA systems |
| **Announcement Date** | **September 22, 2025** |
| **Platform for First Gigawatt** | **NVIDIA Vera Rubin** platform |

### Key Additional Context [1]:
- The investment is structured **progressively** — NVIDIA intends to invest as each gigawatt is deployed (not all at once upfront).
- The **first gigawatt** of NVIDIA systems is scheduled to be deployed in the **second half of 2026** on the Vera Rubin platform.
- The partnership was announced as a **letter of intent** for strategic collaboration between OpenAI and NVIDIA.
- The 10 GW build-out is equivalent to **4–5 million GPUs**, according to NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang [2].

[1] Official Nvidia press release, September 22, 2025
[2] CNBC report on the Nvidia–OpenAI deal, September 22, 2025

citations.title: OpenAI and NVIDIA Announce Strategic Partnership to Deploy 10GW of NVIDIA Systems – Nvidia Newsroom
citations.note: Official Nvidia press release confirming the $100B investment, 10 GW deployment, September 22 2025 date, and Vera Rubin as the first-gigawatt platform.

citations.title: Nvidia to invest up to $100 billion in OpenAI data center buildout – CNBC
citations.note: CNBC report quoting Jensen Huang that the 10 GW project is equivalent to 4–5 million GPUs.

data.confidence: high — All four facts are directly sourced from the official Nvidia press release page, which was successfully fetched and read.
